code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  tokens
end

fn collapse(_ tokens: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut j = 0
  while j < n
    match tokens.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if not has_prev
        result = list.push(result, v)
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      else if v != prev
        result = list.push(result, v)
        prev = v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn render(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    match xs.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  out
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let tokens = parse_tokens(line)
  let collapsed = collapse(tokens)
  println(render(collapsed))
when None
  println("")
end
